allow: PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice -Class Display | Select-Object Status, FriendlyName, InstanceId | Format-List; "--- Driver store / installed driver packages for display ---"; Get-CimInstance Win32_PnPSignedDriver | Where-Object { $_.DeviceClass -eq "DISPLAY" } | Select-Object DeviceName, DriverVersion, DriverDate, DriverProviderName, IsSigned | Format-List)
